Notice Of Motion Andm Oiton To Compel Discovery Responses From Deft
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF KEVIN HART'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Defendant Gonzalez Construction & General Contractor, Inc. The Court received the parties' joint status email on May 28 and addresses them by category: Compensation/Transfers: Granted as to Int. 112, 113, 115. Deny as to Int. 114, 116. Grant as to RFP 68-72. Deny as to RFP 67, 82-83. Profits: Deny as to Int. 16, 102, 119. Deny as to RFP 28, 81, 84. Debts and Loans: Deny as to Ints. 66, 82-95. Deny as to RFP 66-67. Granted in part: Ints. 67-71, as set forth in May 24 tentative ruling. Info re projects other than at house where fire occurred: Deny as to Ints. 92, 93, 94, 118. Deny as to RFP 35, 77, and 79. Partial grant as to Int. 19 and RFP 29, 36, 37, 42. Bank accounts: Deny as to Ints. 76-81. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Notice Of Motion Andm Oiton To Compel Discovery Responses From Deft
Off Calendar May-24-2013 Continued To May-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sara M. Peters, Esq. of Walkup Melodia Kelly & Schoenberger, Tel. 415.981.7210, for plaintiff and moving party;
Illise M. Schulman, Esq. of Michel & Fackler, Tel. 925.933.7309, for defendant Gonzalez Construction;
Jessica S. Pliner, Esq. of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt, Tel. 415.278.9400, for defendants Betty & Gabe Gonzalez;
Vandana Kapur, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith, Tel. 714.545.9200, for cross defendant Hidden Valley Lake Association, by Court Call;
Donald G. Liddy, Esq. of Liddy Law Firm, Tel. 626.229.0921, by Court Call.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court continues PLAINTIFF KEVIN HART's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Defendant for further hearing to May 30, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Counsel were instructed to meet and confer and thereafter notify the Court by email no later than 2:00 pm on May 28, 2013 as to what matters have not been resolved. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Angelica Gutierrez, CSR # 6185 (Barkley Court Reporters 415.433.5777)
